---
title: "Research"
---

# Research

## 1. Metasurface-enabled Optical Computing

This research direction explores how dielectric metasurfaces can perform optical encoding, convolution, and information processing.

## 2. Incoherent Optical Differentiation and Convolution

This direction investigates optical computation under incoherent illumination, with a focus on practical imaging-compatible systems.

## 3. High-dimensional Imaging and Sensing

This direction aims to integrate metasurface encoders with image sensors for snapshot spectral and polarization reconstruction.
